description:
Create, Edit, and Sign Apple Configuration Profiles

iMazing Profile Editor is a free app to easily define settings for deployment on Apple devices.
Fixes in 2.0.2
- Fixed a rare issue that led to an app crash when exporting payloads to plists
- Fixed a rare issue that led to an app crash when exporting custom dictionaries to plists
- Fixed an issue that prevented writing out custom dictionaries to profiles
- Fixed the incorrect evaluation of whether a custom dictionary value is set
